core: Boy Scout Rule: Leave code cleaner than you found it - fix errors, improve code quality even when not directly related to current task
YAGNI: Avoid over-engineering, build what's needed now
DRY: Don't repeat yourself, extract patterns
projectSpecific: Always use branded types for domain IDs (AccountCode, ProductCode)

definitionOfDone: All acceptance criteria tested and passing

features.name: Products
features.description: Product entity features - inventory, pricing, and catalog management

features.name: Accounts
features.description: Account/Chart of Accounts entity features - financial account management

features.name: Contacts
features.description: Contact entity features - extends Names table with unlimited additional contacts per Name

features.name: Transactions
features.description: Transaction and Detail entity features - core financial transactions with header/detail architecture

features.name: Import
features.description: Import functionality - write operations to create/update records in MoneyWorks from SDK

features.name: Reference Tables
features.description: Simple reference/lookup tables - Job, Category1, Category2, and similar static data entities

features.name: Snapshot & Diff Tooling
features.description: Developer tooling for reverse-engineering MoneyWorks behavior via table snapshots and diff analysis

features.name: AI Package POC
features.description: Proof of concept for packages/ai - React Router 7 app with Anthropic Agent SDK integration for AI chat

features.name: AI Tools Integration
features.description: Claude Code-like tool capabilities for the packages/ai app using Anthropic SDK's tool system - file ops, bash, glob, grep

features.name: AI UX & MoneyWorks Tools
features.description: AI chat UX improvements and custom MoneyWorks-specific tools for efficient querying and reporting

features.name: Artifact Display System
features.description: Professional artifact/report display system for AI chat - split-panel layout with pre-built components for financial reports, charts, tables, and metrics

features.name: Daily Transaction Summary
features.description: Daily transaction summary report and artifact for AI assistant - P&L style summary with balance position changes

features.name: Ledger Report
features.description: General Ledger Report artifact for AI assistant - shows all transactions per account with running balances over a date range

features.name: Department Profit & Loss
features.description: Department-level Profit & Loss report artifact with multi-period comparison and YTD support

features.name: Stocktake Report
features.description: Stocktake Report artifact for AI assistant - visual inventory snapshot with stock on hand, low stock warnings, and negative stock alerts

features.name: Aged Payables Report
features.description: Aged Payables Report artifact for AI assistant - displays supplier payment aging with buckets (Current, 30, 60, 90+ days), invoice details, and overdue visual indicators
